steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
Since we need $f(a) = 28$ and $f(x) = 4\sqrt{x}$, we substitute $a$ for $x$:
$$4\sqrt{a} = 28$$

steps.title: Isolate and solve for a
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 4:
$$\sqrt{a} = 7$$
Square both sides to eliminate the square root:
$$a = 49$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
